ham.subject: Your Account: Transaction Alert - ₹5,000 Debited from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have processed a transaction of ₹5,000 from your savings account on 07‑04‑2026 at 10:45 AM.

Transaction Details:
- Beneficiary: ABC Retailers
- Reference No.: 9876543210
- Date: 07 April 2026

If you recognise this debit, no further action is required. If you do not recognise this transaction, please contact our support immediately at 1800‑123‑456 or reply to this email.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best Regards,

Customer Support Team
YourBank

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Overdue - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Client,

This is a reminder that your QuickBooks invoice #QB-2026-00456 is past due. The outstanding amount is $1,250.50 and must be settled within 48 hours to avoid service interruption.

Please review the invoice and make payment by clicking the link below:
<URL>

Failure to pay will result in suspension of your QuickBooks services and additional late fees. If you have already paid, please disregard this notice.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
QuickBooks Billing Team
